title: Provision of Managed IT Services — Borough of Exampleton

raw_requirements.text: The supplier must hold ISO 9001 certification at the time of tender submission.
raw_requirements.source_excerpt: Bidders shall hold a valid ISO 9001 certification at the point of submission. Failure to evidence this will result in the bid being rejected.
raw_requirements.extractor_notes: explicit pass/fail language ('will result in the bid being rejected')

raw_requirements.text: The supplier must hold ISO 9001 certification.
raw_requirements.source_excerpt: ISO 9001 certification must be held at submission.

raw_requirements.text: The supplier must carry employer's liability insurance of at least £5 million.
raw_requirements.source_excerpt: The Supplier shall maintain Employer's Liability Insurance with a minimum indemnity of £5,000,000 for the duration of the contract.

raw_requirements.text: The supplier should provide a named account manager as a single point of contact.
raw_requirements.source_excerpt: Suppliers should ideally provide a named account manager to act as a single point of contact.

raw_requirements.text: The supplier must demonstrate a minimum annual turnover of £2 million over the last two financial years.
raw_requirements.source_excerpt: Minimum annual turnover | £2,000,000 | each of the last 2 financial years | PASS/FAIL
raw_requirements.extractor_notes: found in a table row; PASS/FAIL column indicates gating but layout parsing was noisy — low confidence, flag for review

raw_requirements.text: The supplier must provide two case studies of comparable public-sector contracts delivered in the last three years.
raw_requirements.source_excerpt: Tenderers must submit two case studies of comparable contracts of similar size and scope delivered to public-sector clients within the last three years.
raw_requirements.extractor_notes: mandatory ('must') but not framed as pass/fail disqualifier — gating=false
